name: FORGE — Full Launch Sequence
description: Orchestrates a complete multi-channel product launch: Twitter thread + HN post draft + Reddit post + newsletter + 24hr follow-up. Triggered manually via webhook.

setup.import_instructions: Import into n8n. This workflow is meant to be triggered once per launch. Review all generated content before the workflow posts.
setup.mode: review_before_post — all content generated first, then human approves before posting

payload_schema.launch_name: What you're launching (e.g. 'FORGE v0.1 — open source AI growth system')
payload_schema.github_url: The GitHub repo or release URL
payload_schema.key_feature: The single most important thing about this launch
payload_schema.honest_limitation: One real trade-off or current limitation (HN readers respect honesty)
payload_schema.question_for_hn: The specific question you want HN to engage with

launch_checklist: Post Show HN on Sunday 6-9pm US Pacific for best traction
Have GitHub README polished before posting
Prepare to respond to every HN comment within 2 hours

nodes.name: Generate Launch Content Pack with Claude

body.system: You generate launch content for open source developer tools. You write like a founder talking to peers — direct, specific, zero hype. You know HN culture well and write posts that get real engagement, not eye-rolls.

body.subject: FORGE Launch Pack — Review Before Posting
body.html:
Launch Content Pack

HN Title

{{ $json.hn_title }}

HN Body

{{ $json.hn_body }}

Twitter Thread

{{ JSON.stringify($json.twitter_thread, null, 2) }}

Reddit Post

{{ JSON.stringify($json.reddit_post, null, 2) }}

Newsletter

{{ $json.newsletter_subject }}

{{ $json.newsletter_preview }}

Reply to this email with 'APPROVE' to trigger posting, or make edits and re-trigger.
